title: Portfolio Website Build
description: A responsive personal website built with HTML and CSS to showcase projects, experience, and contact information.

title: Data Analysis Dashboard
description: A beginner dashboard project focused on exploring datasets and presenting patterns clearly through visual design.

title: Machine Learning Classifier
description: A machine learning experiment comparing basic models and evaluating performance on a structured dataset.

title: Study Resource Organizer
description: A lightweight tool concept for organizing academic notes, links, and review materials in one place.

title: Campus Event Finder
description: A simple project idea for surfacing campus opportunities and making student events easier to browse.

title: Research Notes Archive
description: A clean and searchable archive design for organizing technical notes, experiments, and references.

title: Regional Major Power Outage Model
description: An in depth analysis on the causes of major power outages and the use of a machine learning model to predict the cause of outages based on regional facotrs.

title: Full Stack Learning Management System
description: Built full-stack Canva-Style LMS with Supabase, Express, Next.js and React. Implemented Google OAuth for authentication and Google File Picker API for file uploads.

title: Autonomous Mobile Robot Proof of Concept
description: Developed a functional proof of concept similating AMR movement throughout warehouses with varying layouts and obstacles using the VDA 5050 Strategy Report as standards.

title: LLM Benchmarking System
description: Created a benchmarking system to evaluate the performance of various LLMs on a range of tasks, including natural language understanding, generation, and reasoning. The system provides insights into the strengths and weaknesses of different models given little context and domain specific questions.

title: Hierarchical Time Series Analysis
description: Conducted hierarchical time series analysis on e-commerce paltform user interactions to identify anaomaly patterns based on device operating system and geographical location.

title: To Do List Application
description: A simple to-do list application with a clean and intuitive user interface.
